Cancel an in-progress download from an Axivity device

Source: R/download.R
axivity_download_cancel.Rd

Cancel an in-progress download from an Axivity device

Usage

axivity_download_cancel(device_id)

Arguments

device_id

Integer device ID, as returned by axivity_discover().

On this page

axR — Circadia Lab, Northumbria University. Lucas França & Mario Leocadio-Miguel.
